title: Food From Nature | FNN
description: Mod that adds various foods and drinks
body:
## FMM is a mod that adds various foods and drinks to your game.

**Integration with [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)**

### You can see all the content below ⏬

**Also check out this content in gallery**

**# Foods:**
- Raw exp lizard

- Cooked exp lizard

- Nettle Soup

- Pierogi with berries.

- Pierogi with mushrooms.

- Pierogi with meat.

- Apple jam

- Apple jam sandwich

- Acron

- Spurce cone

- Grasshopper leg

- Cooked grasshopper leg

**# Drinks:**

- Birch sap

- Pinecone Syrup

 **# Blocks:**
 
- Pile of cones. (has texture variants)

- Pile of acorns. (has texture variants)

**# Items:**

- Jar.

- Tree tap. (used to extract birch sap)

- Acorn Flour

**# Entityes**

- Exp lizard

- Ladybug

- Grasshopper

**# Plants**

- Nettle

- Tall netle

**# Blocks**

- Acorn block

- Polished acorn block

- acorn block bricks

- Spruce cone block

- Polished spruce cone block

- Spruce cone block bricks

(Free use for modpacks)
